value.label: Russia-backed hackers breach Signal, WhatsApp accounts of officials, journalists
value.value: Users are persuaded in chats initiated by the hackers to divulge security verification and pin codes, giving ‌them access ⁠to personal ⁠accounts and group chats, they said in a statement.

value.label: Flipkart brings back Nishant Verman to aid IPO push
value.value: Verman was earlier part of Flipkart’s corporate development team and played a key role in the company’s $16 billion sale to Walmart in 2018, one of the largest deals in India’s startup ecosystem.

value.label: Poco X8 Pro, Poco X8 Pro confirmed to launch in India on 17 March: Expected pric
value.value: Poco is set to launch the Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max 5G in India on March 17. Both mid-range gaming phones are likelyto feature MediaTek Dimensity processors with massive batteries and AMOLED display.
